name: NVP (Newark Venture Partners)
notes: Also known as Newark.VC. Founded 2015 by Don Katz (Audible founder). Seed/Series A enterprise software focus. HQ in Newark, NJ.

name: Origin Ventures
notes: Founded 1999 in Chicago. Early-stage VC focused on AI/productivity. Also has office in Salt Lake City.

name: Parable
notes: Multiple companies named Parable. Given VC-heavy batch context, matched to Parable VC (parablevc.com), solo GP Anne Lee Skates, SF-based, Consumer/AI focus. Alternative: parable.work (NYC AI startup, 2024) or parable.ventures (HealthTech VC).

name: Picus Capital
notes: Headquartered in Munich, Germany. International VC with offices in Berlin, New York, Beijing, London, São Paulo, Singapore. HQ is not US.

name: Pillar VC
notes: Founded 2016, Boston MA. Pre-seed and seed VC. ~$500M AUM across four funds.

name: Princeville Global
notes: Princeville Global is a fund under Princeville Capital. HQ at 101 Natoma St, San Francisco, CA 94105. Additional offices in Amsterdam and Hong Kong.

name: QED
notes: Formally QED Investors. Founded 2007, headquartered in Alexandria, Virginia. FinTech-focused VC with global reach.

name: Red Dog Capital
notes: Founded 2016 in San Francisco. Micro-VC focused on tech, healthcare, SaaS, AI/ML.

name: Revel
notes: Revel Transit — electric vehicle rideshare company founded 2018, HQ at 273 South 5th St, Brooklyn, NY. Pivoting to EV charging as of 2025.

name: Ridge Ventures
notes: Formerly IDG Ventures USA. Founded 2007, San Francisco. Late Seed / Series A enterprise software VC. $180M Fund V closed April 2023.

name: Ripple Ventures
notes: Headquartered in Toronto, Canada (410 Adelaide St W., Suite 610). Also has office in Vancouver. Pre-seed B2B software VC. Not a US company.

name: Riverwood
notes: Formally Riverwood Capital. HQ at 70 Willow Road Suite 100, Menlo Park, CA 94025. Growth-stage tech VC.
